memoryArtifacts.description:
BYU Film Number 355556
EGBERT GENEALOGY
Descendants of Egbert Sanderson Collateral Lines A-Z, This genealogy was Collected and organized in 5 volumes by Darrell Dwight Matthews.  Microfilmed May 1963.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Grant於1486年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Richard Grant latterly of Stanford Rivers, Essex21歲，母親Virginia Cox19歲。她和Richard Wyllys至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1545年在她的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾普利奧斯 馬爾斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Grant于1486年出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲Richard Grant latterly of Stanford Rivers, Essex21岁，母亲Virginia Cox19岁。她和Richard Wyllys至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1545年在她的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾普利奧斯 馬爾斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Grant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish, English, and especially Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French graund, graunt ‘tall, large’ (Old French grand, grant, from Latin grandis), given either to a person of remarkable size, or else in a relative way to distinguish two bearers of the same personal name, often representatives of different generations within the same family.
English: from the rare Middle English (and Old English) personal name Grante or Grente.
Irish: in Ireland this is usually the Norman Scottish name (see 1 above), but it was also adopted for Irish Mag Raighne, see Graney .

variants.name: Graney
meanings: Irish (Galway, Cork, and Kerry): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Raighne ‘son of Raighne’, a pet form of Raghnall. It has sometimes been changed to Grant . See also Rainey .
Possibly an altered form of Swiss German Gräni, unexplained.

variants.name: Grand
meanings: French: nickname from Old French grand, grant ‘tall, large’, from Latin grandis. See also Grant 1 and 4, compare Degrand and Legrand .
German: topographic name for someone who lived in a gravelly area, from Middle Low German grand ‘coarse gravel’.
German: nickname from a southern word of uncertain origin meaning ‘frustration, anger, ire’.

variants.name: Grande
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Rocco, Domenic, Mario, Antonio, Santo, Orlando, Americo, Carmine, Gennaro, Luigi, Pasquale, Saverio, Alberico.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Alicia, Ricardo, Jorge, Juan, Raul, Angel, Atilio.
Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: nickname for someone of large stature, in either a literal or figurative sense, from grande ‘tall, large’.
German: habitational name from Grande in Holstein or Grand in Bavaria.

variants.name: General
meanings: African American: from the English vocabulary word general, possibly adopted as a surname in honor of a certain general of the US army, most probably Ulysses S. Grant (see Grant , compare President ). Compare also 3 below.
German: nickname for a mercenary (employed in royal services).
Hispanic (mainly Philippines): nickname from Spanish general ‘general’ (military officer).

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Grant was born in 1486, in Warwickshire, England, her father, Richard Grant latterly of Stanford Rivers, Essex, was 21 and her mother, Virginia Cox, was 19. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Richard Wyllys. She died in 1545, in her hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Priors Marston, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Grant est née en 1486, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Grant latterly of Stanford Rivers, Essex, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Virginia Cox, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Richard Wyllys. Elle est décédée en 1545, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Priors Marston, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane Grant 1486 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Grant latterly of Stanford Rivers, Essex 21 und ihre Mutter Virginia Cox 19. Sie hatte mit Richard Wyllys mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1545 im Alter von 59 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Priors Marston, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Grant è nata il nel 1486 nel Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Richard Grant latterly of Stanford Rivers, Essex, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Virginia Cox, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Richard Wyllys. Morì nel 1545, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Priors Marston, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Grantが1486年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Grant latterly of Stanford Rivers, Essexは21歳，母Virginia Coxは19歳であった。彼女はRichard Wyllysとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1545年に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアプリオルズ マーストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Grant(이)가 1486년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Grant latterly of Stanford Rivers, Essex(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Virginia Cox(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Richard Wyllys(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 그녀의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 프리오르스 마스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Grant nasceu em 1486, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Grant latterly of Stanford Rivers, Essex, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Virginia Cox, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Richard Wyllys. Ela faleceu em 1545, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Priors Marston, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Grant родилась в 1486 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Grant latterly of Stanford Rivers, Essex было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Virginia Cox, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Richard Wyllys. Она умерла в 1545 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности приорс марстон, варвиккшир, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Richard Wyllys. Murió en 1545, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Priors Marston, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
